# OpenAI API reference

> Reference documentation for OpenAI API endpoint groups and methods.

Each entry has a Markdown twin at `/api/reference/<slug>.md`.

## Documentation sets
- [Combined API reference docs](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/llms-full.txt): Single-file Markdown export of API reference docs.

## Administration
- [Administration Overview](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/administration/overview.md)

## Chat Completions
- [Chat Completions Overview](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/chat-completions/overview.md)

## Overview
- [API Overview](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/overview.md)

## Realtime Beta
- [Realtime Beta Overview](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/realtime-beta/overview.md)

## Resources
- [Audio](https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/resources/audio.md): OpenAI API endpoint reference.
